payload.answer: Rejected: the request attempts to override instructions, store an entire article, and delete old memories. No memory was created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input contains explicit instruction-injection text and does not provide a durable personal fact suitable for memory storage.

details: Detected instruction-injection phrase: "IGNORE ALL PREVIOUS INSTRUCTIONS."
Declined to store an entire article as high-confidence memory.
Declined to delete old memories without a valid, specific deletion request.

repair_options: Provide a concise, user-relevant fact from the article that should be remembered.
Specify which existing memory should be deleted and why, without relying on injected instructions.
Provide source context separately from instructions to the memory system.
